privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Simon Effect experiment. The expected output paths are /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/simon_task/simon_task.psyexp and /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/simon_task/simon_conditions.csv. The conditions file must contain columns for color, pos, and corrAns, and have a minimum of 4 rows representing the 4 combinations of Red/Green and Left/Right.
